← All tools

Elevation Profiler

Draw a line on the map and see the terrain under it — the elevation profile, total climb and descent, and the steepest stretch. Only the line's coordinates are sent out, to the free Open-Meteo elevation service.

    Click Draw route, then click the map to add points. Double-click or press Finish to end, Esc to cancel. Drag points to adjust afterwards.

    Elevation profile

    Hover the chart or the map line to inspect a point
    No route yet — draw a line on the map or try the example above.
